metadata.name: Docker Orphan Detection
metadata.description: Detects orphaned Docker resources (dead/exited containers, dangling images, volumes, and networks) and optionally sends a report to Discord via webhook.

items.name: discord_enabled
items.title: Discord
items.description: Send orphan detection summary to Discord webhook

items.name: discord_message_prefix
items.title: Discord Message Prefix
items.description: Prefix line sent before report content

items.name: report_root
items.title: Report Root
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: orphan_dead_containers
items.title: Orphan Dead Containers
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: orphan_dangling_images
items.title: Orphan Dangling Images
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: orphan_dangling_volumes
items.title: Orphan Dangling Volumes
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: docker_orphan_report_body
items.title: Orphan Report Body
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: report_timestamp
items.title: Report Timestamp
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: orphan_exited_containers
items.title: Orphan Exited Containers
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: orphan_dangling_networks
items.title: Orphan Dangling Networks
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: report_file_name
items.title: Report File Name
items.description: Name to use for the report file.
